name: Almarai Company
sub_sector: Dairy, Juices, Bakery, Poultry — Food & Beverage
description: The largest vertically integrated dairy food and beverage company in the world, producing dairy products, juices, bakery items, and poultry. Listed on Saudi Stock Exchange (Tadawul).

name: Tanmiah Food Company
description: A premium Saudi poultry producer raising cage-free, hormone-free, corn-fed chickens. One of the leading poultry brands in Saudi Arabia listed on Tadawul.

query: Dairy, Agriculture, Juices, Food Production, Saudi Arabia
name: NADEC (National Agricultural Development Company)
description: NADEC is one of Saudi Arabia's largest integrated agricultural and food production companies, specializing in dairy products, juices, and crop farming. The company operates vast farmlands and modern processing facilities across the Kingdom.

query: Packaged Food, Water, Beverages, Snacks, GCC, FMCG
name: Agthia Group
description: Agthia Group is a leading GCC food and beverage conglomerate with significant operations in Saudi Arabia, offering trusted brands in water, beverages, protein foods, and snacks. The company focuses on sustainable growth and innovation across multiple consumer categories.

query: Food Retail, Convenience Stores, Restaurants, Petrol Stations, Saudi Arabia
name: SASCO (Saudi Automotive Services Company)
description: SASCO is a Saudi Arabian company operating an integrated network of petrol stations combined with food retail outlets, restaurants, and convenience stores across the Kingdom. The company provides food and beverage services to travelers and motorists at its highway and urban locations.

query: Hypermarket, Grocery Retail, Franchise, Majid Al Futtaim, FMCG
name: Carrefour Saudi Arabia (Majid Al Futtaim)
description: Carrefour Saudi Arabia operates hypermarkets and supermarkets throughout the Kingdom under a franchise agreement with Majid Al Futtaim. It offers a vast selection of food, groceries, electronics, and apparel, serving millions of customers in Riyadh, Jeddah, and other major Saudi cities. The brand is among the top grocery retailers in the GCC region.

query: Hypermarket, Grocery Retail, LuLu Group, GCC Retail, FMCG
name: Lulu Hypermarket Saudi Arabia
description: Lulu Hypermarket is a leading retail chain in Saudi Arabia operated by the UAE-based LuLu Group International, with numerous large-format stores across Riyadh, Jeddah, and other cities. The chain is popular for its extensive product range covering groceries, electronics, clothing, and fresh food at competitive prices. Lulu is one of the most visited hypermarket destinations among both Saudi families and expatriates.

query: Supermarket, Grocery Retail, Tadawul Listed, Nationwide Chain, FMCG
name: Othaim Markets
description: Othaim Markets is a major Saudi grocery retail chain and a leading player in the Kingdom's supermarket sector, operating hundreds of stores nationwide. Listed on the Saudi Stock Exchange (Tadawul), the company is known for offering high-quality products at affordable prices and delivering innovative shopping experiences. It serves millions of customers across Saudi Arabia with a strong focus on customer care.

query: Supermarket, Fresh Produce, Grocery Retail, Organic, FMCG
name: Farm Superstores
description: Farm Superstores is a Saudi retail grocery chain offering a wide selection of fresh produce, food products, and household essentials across multiple locations in the Kingdom. Known for its focus on fresh and organic produce, Farm Superstores caters to health-conscious shoppers and families. The chain operates primarily in major urban centers including Riyadh and the Eastern Province.

query: skincare, personal care, cosmetics, private label, FMCG
name: NAQI Cosmetics
description: NAQI is a Saudi-based cosmetic and functional skincare brand offering a wide range of personal care products. The company also provides personalized private label manufacturing services for businesses. NAQI blends modern formulations with regional market preferences across the GCC.

query: personal care, hygiene, supply chain, consumer products, Riyadh
name: International Personal Care (IPC Saudi Arabia)
description: IPC Saudi Arabia is a personal care company operating in the Kingdom, offering a range of integrated services and products in the consumer hygiene and care segment. The company serves both retail and institutional clients across Saudi Arabia. It focuses on product planning, supply, and logistics for the personal care industry.

query: household products, consumer goods, distribution, conglomerate, Riyadh
name: Al Babtain Group
description: Al Babtain Group is a long-established Saudi conglomerate with diversified interests including consumer goods, household products, and retail distribution. The group represents and distributes several international consumer staples brands across the Kingdom. It operates through multiple subsidiaries covering automotive, electronics, and FMCG consumer products.

query: household cleaning, personal care, hygiene, manufacturing, Saudi Arabia
name: Niza Group
description: Niza Group is a Saudi company engaged in the manufacturing and marketing of personal care and household cleaning products. The company targets both retail and B2B markets across the Kingdom with a range of hygiene, cleaning, and grooming product lines. Niza Group leverages local production capabilities to cater to the growing demand for affordable consumer staples in Saudi Arabia.
